tasks.label: Select nRF Connect SDK
tasks.command: west config manifest.file west_nrfsdk.yml && west config manifest.path firmware

tasks.label: Select McuXpresso SDK
tasks.command: west config manifest.file west_mcuxsdk.yml && west config manifest.path firmware

tasks.label: Select SDK by vscode workspace
tasks.command: west config manifest.file west_${config:firmware.startupSdk}.yml && west config manifest.path firmware
